title: Section 5
content: 2[5. Direction imposing disabilities in respect of entry, travel and residence not to apply to armed forces.--Any direction made by the Central Government under section 3 imposing disabilities in respect of entry into or travel or residence in 1[India] upon persons domiciled in a British Possession shall not, until the expiry of six months after the termination of the present hostilities, apply to any person domiciled in that British Possession who is a member of its armed forces.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 3 of 1951, s. 3 and the Sch. for "the States". 2. Subs. by Act 22 of 1943, s. 5, for the original s. 5.
